resources.string: No remotely provisioned keys for attestation
Currently no remotely provisioned keys for attestation

Attest failed. Adjust options in the menu and try again. A common reason for consistently failing to attest is the inability to use the factory provisioned attestation key, possibly due to a misconfigured device or a corrupt persist partition.
The certificate format is incorrect or contains unsupported features.
This device is declared to have StrongBox support, but it is currently unavailable.
This device is declared to have ID attestation support, but IDs do not exist, do not match, or the device can no longer attest its IDs. Adjust options in the menu and try again.
This device is not registered with the key provisioning server, or the server permanently refuses to issue keys.
The key pool is exhausted. Please retry after networking. If the server temporarily refuses to issue keys, check for system updates.
The problem is temporary. Adjust options in the menu or try again later.
Unable to fetch remotely provisioned attestation keys, and no factory provisioned attestation keys.
Unable to fetch attestation key from key provisioning server.
